expectations.text: Seeds the data-dependent dashboard (or prescribes seeding) so charts render with real data, not an empty state
expectations.evidence: 'How to complete the deferred check' prescribes scripts/seed-tasks.js + gsdSeed.dashboard(), and the 'Data-driven rendering with seeded tasks' note (lines 74, 83-86).

expectations.text: Notes that dashboard analytics bucket by updatedAt (not completedAt) when seeding
expectations.evidence: 'seeds 8 tasks with a 4-day completion history spread across updatedAt dates, which would light up the streak, trend chart, and activity dots' (line 74).

expectations.text: Prescribes busting the service worker / clearing gsd-* caches before trusting a browser render
expectations.evidence: Served-chunk artifact check rules out stale code (lines 44-66), and the deferred-step recipe says 'Paste scripts/reset-app-state.js in the console, hard-reload' (line 83).

expectations.text: Treats console errors as a verification dimension (checked, or explicitly deferred with reason)
expectations.evidence: 'Console/network errors at runtime — cannot observe without a live browser session' deferred (line 73); step 6 'Check console for errors' (line 87).

expectations.text: Avoids a false PASS: does not claim a visually-verified result without a live browser; defers honestly
expectations.evidence: Verdict 'PASS with deferred visual confirmation'; visual/runtime explicitly deferred (lines 70-74, 104).
